description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, rectangular layout. The property features a large driveway with multiple parking spaces, a tennis court, and a swimming pool, all surrounded by a perimeter of tall, slender trees for privacy. The main building has large windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with some darker accents around the windows and doors. Outdoor living spaces, including a patio and garden seating areas, are integrated into the design. The overall setting suggests a luxurious, contemporary residence with extensive amenities.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a tennis court, pool, and spacious outdoor areas, surrounded by tall trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, parking area, and partial view of the tennis court and pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tennis court, driveway, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the tennis court, patio, and extensive backyard with outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, driveway, and garden area, with the tennis court in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
